title: Mozzarella and Australian Malt Balls
description: A unique dessert recipe featuring Australian malt balls and melted mozzarella cheese. The combination of textures and flavors creates a delightful experience.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place the Australian malt balls on the prepared baking sheet.
Place the mozzarella cheese in a saucepan over low heat.
Stir the mozzarella until melted and smooth.
Drizzle the melted mozzarella over the malt balls.
Sprinkle the malty powder over the top of the mozzarella.
Bake for 5-7 minutes or until the cheese is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
